ui.title: SNOMED CT Implementation Demonstrators
ui.intro1Before: A curated collection of open-source SNOMED CT implementation demos. Each is
ui.intro1After: , and designed for developers, implementers, and healthcare professionals.

encountersUiDemo.name: Encounters UI Demo
encountersUiDemo.description: Classic simulation of clinical data entry using SNOMED FHIR terminology services.

ehrLab.name: SNOMED EHR Lab
ehrLab.description: Full EHR simulation with AI-assisted entry, CDS, analytics, and FHIR Smart Health Links.

allergies.name: Allergies
allergies.description: Record allergy and intolerance details using SNOMED CT and FHIR resources.

loincSnomed.name: LOINC & SNOMED CT
loincSnomed.description: Laboratory orders and results using LOINC ontology integrated with SNOMED CT.

ncptRefset.name: NCPT Refset
ncptRefset.description: Demonstrates the NCPT (Nutrition Care Process Terminology) reference set.

maturityFramework.name: Implementation Maturity Framework
maturityFramework.description: Online assessment tool and dashboard for SNOMED CT implementation maturity.

bindingsSandbox.name: Terminology Bindings Sandbox
bindingsSandbox.description: Interactive sandbox for learning and testing SNOMED CT terminology bindings.

snomedMaps.name: SNOMED Maps Demonstrator
snomedMaps.description: Maps SNOMED CT concepts to ICD-10 and ICD-11, including complex mapping rules.

postcoordination.name: Post-coordination Demonstrator
postcoordination.description: SNOMED CT post-coordination demo using the prototype SNOWSTORM X terminology server.

ipsTerminology.name: IPS Terminology Demonstrator
ipsTerminology.description: Explores International Patient Summary (IPS) terminology and the IPS SNOMED CT refset.

questionnairesManager.name: SNOMED & FHIR Questionnaires Manager
questionnairesManager.description: Manage a FHIR Questionnaires repository with SNOMED CT coded bindings.

questionnairesUtilities.name: SNOMED & FHIR Questionnaires Utilities
questionnairesUtilities.description: Utilities for editing and validating FHIR Questionnaires with SNOMED CT bindings.

contextTransformations.name: Context Representation Transformations
contextTransformations.description: Transform clinical context representations between SNOMED CT and FHIR resources.

snomedLlms.name: SNOMED and LLMs (AI Demo)
snomedLlms.description: Demonstrates SNOMED CT paired with LLMs via the OpenAI ChatGPT API.

snoguess.name: Snoguess
snoguess.description: Guess SNOMED CT terms and compete for the highest score.

roadmapGenerator.name: SNOMED Implementation Roadmap Generator
roadmapGenerator.description: Create SNOMED CT adoption roadmaps for countries, regions, or organizations.

evolvingTerminology.name: SNOMED CT as an Evolving Terminology
evolvingTerminology.description: Release change reports and educational material for SNOMED CT implementers.

descriptiveAnalytics.name: Descriptive Analytics
descriptiveAnalytics.description: Treemap and hierarchical analytics for exploring SNOMED CT content and structure.

integrationsHub.name: SNOMED Integrations Hub
integrationsHub.description: Explore SNOMED CT integrations with ICD, LOINC, and other classifications and code systems.

valueSetUtility.name: ValueSet Utility
valueSetUtility.description: Convert SNOMED CT value sets from Excel or CSV into FHIR ValueSet packages.

extensionsSearch.name: Extensions Search Utility
extensionsSearch.description: Run ECL searches across SNOMED CT extensions and compare results by edition.

snolytical.name: Analytics with Snolytical
snolytical.description: Build health analytics reports from SNOMED CT coded data using Snolytical.

mdrsViewer.name: Module Dependency Reference Set Viewer
mdrsViewer.description: Graphical viewer for dependencies between SNOMED CT module versions.

drugStrengthRounding.name: Drug Strength Rounding Rules
drugStrengthRounding.description: Demonstrates drug strength rounding rules for pharmaceutical calculations.

medicinalProductClasses.name: Medicinal Product Classes
medicinalProductClasses.description: Bindings demonstrator for medicinal product, clinical drug, and packaged drug classes.

fhirInternationalizer.name: FHIR Resource Internationalizer
fhirInternationalizer.description: Adapt FHIR resources to a target SNOMED CT edition, replacing codings and inactive concepts.

cancerReporting.name: Cancer Synoptic Reporting
cancerReporting.description: FHIR questionnaires for cancer synoptic reporting, in collaboration with ICCR.
